subcodes.first_line: O sincere seeker and cherished companion, that which thou hast written was perused with utmost care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب صادق و حبیب موافق آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گشت و بمنتهای دقت
subcodes.subjects: @twin Manifestations, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @contention and conflict
